response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases, aligning with core requirements, but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) vastly exceeds the entry-level position, raising concerns about fit, retention, and salary expectations; additionally, his German language skills are basic, conflicting with high on-site presence in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from API to UI with scalable architectures
Active open-source contributions and deep understanding of devops and CI/CD
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role; likely to leave quickly or demand senior compensation
Basic German proficiency may hinder on-site collaboration in Berlin
Extensive background in DLang and embedded systems may indicate misalignment with renewable energy domain focus
